text: 自从接受手术以来 Siddique瘦了约十四公斤。
traditional_chinese: 自從接受手術以來，Siddique瘦了約十四公斤。
English: Siddique has lost about fourteen kilograms since undergoing surgery.
Vietnamese: Siddique đã giảm khoảng mười bốn cân kể từ khi phẫu thuật.
French: Siddique a perdu environ quatorze kilos depuis qu'il a subi une intervention chirurgicale.
